def f(container, cron):
    if not cron in container:
        return container
    pref = container[:container.index(cron)].copy()
    suff = container[container.index(cron) + 1:].copy()
    return pref + suff

def f(text, sep, maxsplit):
    splitted = text.rsplit(sep, maxsplit)
    length = len(splitted)
    new_splitted = splitted[:length // 2]
    new_splitted.reverse()
    new_splitted += splitted[length // 2:]
    return sep.join(new_splitted)
